languages.text: "Ювенна неприкосновенна, но слишком уж играет на руку врагу. В нашем стане таится шпион, и теперь я подозреваю, что он связан с сестрицей. Если за всем стоит она, нам нужно застать ее с поличным — никак не меньше. И еще одно: "Воск еще теплый" — фраза моих самых доверенных агентов. Отныне она по праву принадлежит и вам, как моему соратнику".

traits.locale_text: "Ювенна неприкосновенна, но слишком уж играет на руку врагу. В нашем стане таится шпион, и теперь я подозреваю, что он связан с сестрицей. Если за всем стоит она, нам нужно застать ее с поличным — никак не меньше. И еще одно: "Воск ещё тёплый" — фраза моих самых доверенных агентов. Отныне она по праву принадлежит и вам, как моему соратнику".

languages.text: "Juvenna is untouchable, but she is playing too much into the hands of the enemy. There is a spy in our camp, and I now suspect that spy is connected to my sister. If she is behind this, we must catch her in the act — nothing less will do. And one more thing: 'The wax is still warm' is the code phrase of my most trusted agents. From now on, it belongs to you too, as my ally."
languages.original_text: "Ювенна неприкосновенна, но слишком уж играет на руку врагу. В нашем стане таится шпион, и теперь я подозреваю, что он связан с сестрицей. Если за всем стоит она, нам нужно застать ее с поличным — никак не меньше. И еще одно: "Воск еще теплый" — фраза моих самых доверенных агентов. Отныне она по праву принадлежит и вам, как моему соратнику".

If she is behind this, we must catch her in the act — nothing less will do. And one more thing: 'The wax is still warm' is the code phrase of my most trusted agents. From now on, it belongs to you too, as my ally."

languages.text: “尤文娜动不得，可她这么做简直是在给敌人递刀子。我们内部有奸细，而我现在怀疑，那奸细跟我的姐妹脱不了干系。如果真是她在背后捣鬼，那我们必须抓她个现行，此事别无他法。另外，‘蜡烛仍有余温’是我最信任的特工间所用的暗语。从今往后，你也可以用，作为我的盟友。”
languages.original_text: "Juvenna is untouchable, but she is playing too much into the hands of the enemy. There is a spy in our camp, and I now suspect that spy is connected to my sister. If she is behind this, we must catch her in the act — nothing less will do. And one more thing: 'The wax is still warm' is the code phrase of my most trusted agents. From now on, it belongs to you too, as my ally."

traits.locale_text: “尤文娜动不得，可她这么做简直是在给敌人递刀子。我们内部有奸细，而我现在怀疑，那奸细跟我的姐妹脱不了干系。如果真是她在背后捣鬼，那我们必须抓她个现行，此事别无他法。另外，‘蜡烛仍有余温’是我最信任的特工间所用的暗语。从今往后，你也可以用，作为我的盟友。”

languages.text: « Juvenna est intouchable, mais ses agissements font trop souvent le jeu de l'ennemi. Il y a un agent double dans notre camp, et je soupçonne à présent un lien avec ma sœur. Si elle est bel et bien derrière tout ça, nous devons la prendre la main dans le sac, rien de moins. Une dernière chose, avant de nous quitter : "La cire est encore chaude", telle est la phrase codée réservée à mes plus proches agents. Si je vous la confie à votre tour, c'est que nous sommes désormais {mf|alliés|alliées}. »
languages.original_text: "Juvenna is untouchable, but she is playing too much into the hands of the enemy. There is a spy in our camp, and I now suspect that spy is connected to my sister. If she is behind this, we must catch her in the act — nothing less will do. And one more thing: 'The wax is still warm' is the code phrase of my most trusted agents. From now on, it belongs to you too, as my ally."

traits.locale_text: « Juvenna est intouchable, mais ses agissements font trop souvent le jeu de l'ennemi. Il y a un agent double dans notre camp, et je soupçonne à présent un lien avec ma sœur. Si elle est bel et bien derrière tout ça, nous devons la prendre la main dans le sac, rien de moins. Une dernière chose, avant de nous quitter : "La cire est encore chaude", telle est la phrase codée réservée à mes plus proches agents. Si je vous la confie à votre tour, c'est que nous sommes désormais {mf|alliés|alliées}. »

languages.text: "Juvenna dokunulmazdır ancak düşmanın ekmeğine yağ sürdüğü gerçeği ortada. Kampımızda bir casus var, artık o casusun kız kardeşimle bir bağı olduğundan da şüphelenmeye başladım. Bu meselenin ardında o varsa onu suçüstü yakalamamız gerekiyor. Başka türlü kanıtlamamız imkânsız. Son bir şey daha: 'Bal mumu hâlâ sıcak' cümlesi, en güvendiğim adamlarımın şifresidir. Şu andan itibaren müttefikimsiniz, artık sizin de şifreniz bu."
languages.original_text: "Juvenna is untouchable, but she is playing too much into the hands of the enemy. There is a spy in our camp, and I now suspect that spy is connected to my sister. If she is behind this, we must catch her in the act — nothing less will do. And one more thing: 'The wax is still warm' is the code phrase of my most trusted agents. From now on, it belongs to you too, as my ally."

traits.locale_text: "Juvenna dokunulmazdır ancak düşmanın ekmeğine yağ sürdüğü gerçeği ortada. Kampımızda bir casus var, artık o casusun kız kardeşimle bir bağı olduğundan da şüphelenmeye başladım. Bu meselenin ardında o varsa onu suçüstü yakalamamız gerekiyor. Başka türlü kanıtlamamız imkânsız. Son bir şey daha: 'Bal mumu hâlâ sıcak' cümlesi, en güvendiğim adamlarımın şifresidir. Şu andan itibaren müttefikimsiniz, artık sizin de şifreniz bu."

languages.text: «Juvenna es intocable, pero está favoreciendo en gran medida las estrategias del enemigo. Hay un espía entre nosotros y sospecho que está vinculado con mi hermana. Si ella está detrás de todo, debemos descubrirla en el acto: esa es nuestra única opción. Una cosa más: "La cera aún está caliente" es el código de mis agentes de mayor confianza. A partir de ahora, también le pertenece a usted, como aliad{mf|o|a} mí{mf|o|a}».
languages.original_text: "Juvenna is untouchable, but she is playing too much into the hands of the enemy. There is a spy in our camp, and I now suspect that spy is connected to my sister. If she is behind this, we must catch her in the act — nothing less will do. And one more thing: 'The wax is still warm' is the code phrase of my most trusted agents. From now on, it belongs to you too, as my ally."

traits.locale_text: «Juvenna es intocable, pero está favoreciendo en gran medida las estrategias del enemigo. Hay un espía entre nosotros y sospecho que está vinculado con mi hermana. Si ella está detrás de todo, debemos descubrirla en el acto: esa es nuestra única opción. Una cosa más: "La cera aún está caliente" es el código de mis agentes de mayor confianza. A partir de ahora, también le pertenece a usted, como aliad{mf|o|a} mí{mf|o|a}».

languages.text: "Juvenna ist unantastbar, aber sie spielt dem Feind zu sehr in die Hände. Es gibt einen Spion in unserem Lager und mittlerweile glaube ich, es besteht eine Verbindung zu meiner Schwester. Wenn sie hinter der Sache steckt, müssen wir sie in flagranti erwischen ... das ist die einzige Chance. Und noch etwas: 'Das Wachs ist noch warm' ist die Losung meiner vertrauenswürdigsten Agenten. Ab sofort gehört auch Ihr dazu, als {mf|mein Verbündeter|meine Verbündete}."
languages.original_text: "Juvenna is untouchable, but she is playing too much into the hands of the enemy. There is a spy in our camp, and I now suspect that spy is connected to my sister. If she is behind this, we must catch her in the act — nothing less will do. And one more thing: 'The wax is still warm' is the code phrase of my most trusted agents. From now on, it belongs to you too, as my ally."

traits.locale_text: "Juvenna ist unantastbar, aber sie spielt dem Feind zu sehr in die Hände. Es gibt einen Spion in unserem Lager und mittlerweile glaube ich, es besteht eine Verbindung zu meiner Schwester. Wenn sie hinter der Sache steckt, müssen wir sie in flagranti erwischen ... das ist die einzige Chance. Und noch etwas: 'Das Wachs ist noch warm' ist die Losung meiner vertrauenswürdigsten Agenten. Ab sofort gehört auch Ihr dazu, als {mf|mein Verbündeter|meine Verbündete}."

languages.text: 「ジュヴェナは手も足も出ない。だが、敵の思う壺に嵌っている。我々の陣営にスパイがいる。そのスパイは妹と繋がっているのではないかと疑う。もし妹が裏で動いているのなら、その証拠を掴むしかない。もう一つ、信頼できる諜報員が使う暗号語は「蝋はまだ温か」。これから君もその暗号語を使うことになる。君も我の同盟者だ。」
languages.original_text: "Juvenna is untouchable, but she is playing too much into the hands of the enemy. There is a spy in our camp, and I now suspect that spy is connected to my sister. If she is behind this, we must catch her in the act — nothing less will do. And one more thing: 'The wax is still warm' is the code phrase of my most trusted agents. From now on, it belongs to you too, as my ally."

traits.locale_text: 「ジュヴェナは手も足も出ない。だが、敵の思う壺に嵌っている。我々の陣営にスパイがいる。そのスパイは妹と繋がっているのではないかと疑う。もし妹が裏で動いているのなら、その証拠を掴むしかない。もう一つ、信頼できる諜報員が使う暗号語は「蝋はまだ温か」。これから君もその暗号語を使うことになる。君も我の同盟者だ。」
